summary: An Alien Registration Requirement how-to PSA ('Start the registration process') walking viewers through filing Form G-325R online. Captioned voiceover narration plays over blurred silhouettes of people and a screen recording of the myUSCIS website sign-up page, framed by ARR logo and URL cards. It is a procedural, narration-driven informational PSA with no music track or genre/youth-appeal treatment.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; Are you an alien in the United States; by creating an online account at; my USCIS; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
